
### exercise  {.smaller}


```
void example(unsigned x, unsigned y) {
    if (x > y) return;
    x = x + y;
    assert(x + y + 1 > y);
}

```
 

* 1: to see if the assertion is meant, the equation we should solve (if initial values of x, y, are X, Y)?
* 2: what is an input that fails the assertion? (hint: integer overflow)
